subject: [PATCH 2/7 v3] mm/page_counter: use page_counter_stock in page_counter_try_charge

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch modifies the page_counter_try_charge function to be aware of stock limits. It first checks if there is enough stock available, and if so, charges from the stock without attempting a hierarchical charge. If there is not enough stock, it attempts a greedy hierarchical charge and then tries to add any surplus pages to the stock. The patch preserves the existing semantics for handling stock in try_charge_memcg.
